assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md states 'All required sections are present in the bug description' and lists all four required sections under '### Required Sections': '#### Issue Description' (lines 31-35), '#### Steps to Reproduce' (lines 37-46), '#### Expected Result' (lines 48-50), '#### Actual Result' (lines 52-55). The bug-template-mock.md defines these four required heading formats (Issue Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) and all four are correctly extracted with their full content.

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md line 13: 'The issue's `issuetype.id` is **10020**, which matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration. Validated successfully.' Also line 7 shows 'Bug issue type ID: 10020' under Configuration Validation.

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md lines 22-24: 'The extraction at `line[3:]` does NOT strip trailing whitespace. When the heading line is `## Migration Patterns  \n`, the extracted section name becomes `"Migration Patterns  "` (with two trailing spaces).' Lines 38-39: 'Divergence point: The behavior diverges at the heading extraction step (`line[3:]`), where trailing whitespace is preserved.'

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md — What: 'The plan-feature skill's convention heading extraction uses `line[3:]` to extract the section name after the `## ` prefix, but does not strip trailing whitespace' (lines 9-11). Where: 'plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md -- convention heading extraction loop' (line 19) and 'convention-aware task enrichment (exact-match lookup)' (line 21). How to verify: 'Create a test fixture `CONVENTIONS.md` with trailing whitespace on at least one heading line... Run the plan-feature convention conformance analysis against this fixture and assert that: The convention IS matched despite trailing whitespace on the heading.' (lines 35-39).

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 53 (first acceptance criterion): '- [ ] A reproducer test demonstrates that CONVENTIONS.md headings with trailing whitespace are correctly matched (test fails before fix, passes after fix)'. This precedes the fix criteria on lines 54-56: normalizing section names, including convention references, and no regression.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 59 (first test requirement): '- [ ] Reproducer test: create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on heading lines (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  `), run convention conformance analysis, and assert the convention is matched and included in the generated task's Implementation Notes (expected: `Per CONVENTIONS.md Migration Patterns: add Index::create() for all FK columns.`)'. The assertion guidance is directly derived from the bug's Expected Result and Steps to Reproduce.

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 66-72, '## Bug Context' section contains: Bug key '[ACME-500](https://mock-jira.example.com/browse/ACME-500)' (line 68), Steps to Reproduce (line 69), Expected Result (line 70), Actual Result (line 71), and Root Cause summary (line 72: 'The convention heading extraction uses `line[3:]` without stripping trailing whitespace...').

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 13-14: '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence:
task-description.md lines 1-7: '<!-- Jira API Metadata
jira.create_issue parameters:
  project_key: ACME
  issue_type: Task
  labels:
    - ai-generated-jira
-->'. The label 'ai-generated-jira' is explicitly listed under 'labels' in the 'jira.create_issue parameters' block.
